summary: First-iteration backend testing for Призма (Prizma) ingest+analytics API. Created /app/backend/tests/test_prizma_api.py (pytest, 27 tests across 8 classes) covering root, X-Extension-Api-Key auth enforcement, all /api/ingest/* endpoints (single, batch, page, cf-session), /api/products listing+filters+search+pagination, discount_percent calculation, /api/analytics/{summary,top-sellers,source-distribution}, /api/pages, CORS preflight + actual POST, and MongoDB _id leak prevention. All 27 tests passed against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
critical_code_review_comments: captured_at is stored as ISO string (now_iso) but Pydantic ProductOut.captured_at is typed as datetime — slight inconsistency; harmless because the field is never used for response serialization (raw dict returned), but could trip future typed responses.

last_24h count uses string comparison on captured_at ISO — works because ISO 8601 sorts lexicographically only when timezone offset is uniform; current code always writes UTC isoformat so it is OK, but documenting/asserting UTC would harden it.
/api/analytics/source-distribution computes 'Rozetka власні' via seller in [None,'Rozetka','ROZETKA'] — heuristic; consider an explicit flag/marketplace field for accuracy.
ingest_products inserts via insert_many without ordered=False; a single bad doc would fail the entire batch. Pydantic validation upfront mitigates this, but ordered=False would be safer.
No index hints on db.products (source, captured_at, seller, title regex) — listing/aggregation will degrade once data grows; add indexes before scaling.
EXTENSION_API_KEY has a hardcoded fallback default ('prizma_dev_key_2026') in server.py — fine for dev, but in prod the app should fail fast if env var missing rather than fallback to a known key.
seed_data_creation: Tests inserted TEST_-prefixed products (1 single + 4 batch + 1 NoOldPrice = 6), 1 page snapshot, 1 cf_session per run via /api/ingest/* — used to validate persistence, discount calc, search, and analytics aggregation. No cleanup endpoint exists; data accumulates across runs but is harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints are healthy. The pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_prizma_api.py is the canonical regression suite — reuse it. BASE_URL is read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL_TEST env or falls back to the hardcoded preview URL; prefer setting the env var. CORS is wide-open ('*'), preflight passes. Discount calc verified (~33.3% on price=100/old=150). MongoDB _id is properly excluded in /api/products and /api/pages. No frontend testing performed — main agent requested backend only.
